parameters.jsCode:
const base = $('Prepare Exact Buffered IDs').first()?.json || {};
return [{ json: { drain_lock_key: base.drain_lock_key } }];

nodes.name: Set Resolved WA Media URL From API1

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.value: ={{ $('Compute Media Path1').item.json.media?.mime_type || ($('Compute Media Path1').item.json.content_type === 'image' ? 'image/jpeg' : ($('Compute Media Path1').item.json.content_type === 'audio' ? 'audio/ogg' : 'application/octet-stream')) }}

parameters.text:
=Analyze the attached inbound customer image and return ONLY valid JSON with exact keys: description, detected_text, objects, safety_notes.

Rules:
- description: concise plain-English image description.
- detected_text: array of strings seen in the image.
- objects: array of short object labels.
- safety_notes: array of short notes, empty array if nothing notable.
- No markdown.
- No code fences.
- No extra keys.
- Use the customer caption only as optional context, do not replace it.

Customer caption:
{{ $json.content_text || '' }}

options.systemMessage: You are analyzing an inbound customer image for a messaging inbox pipeline. Return ONLY valid JSON with exact keys: description, detected_text, objects, safety_notes.

parameters.jsCode: return [ $items('Resolve Org Usage')[0] ];
return [ $items('Resolve Usage')[0] ];

parameters.sessionKey: ={{ ($('Normalize Inbound Messages1').item.json.sender_external_id + $('Normalize Inbound Messages1').item.json.platform + $('Normalize Inbound Messages1').item.json.org_id).toString() }}

parameters.jsonQuery:
={
  "consumer_key": "{{ $('Get Organization').item.json.external_onboarding_data.integrations.woocommerce.consumer_key }}",
  "consumer_secret": "{{ $('Get Organization').item.json.external_onboarding_data.integrations.woocommerce.consumer_secret }}",
  "status": "publish",
  "catalog_visibility": "visible",
  "search": "{{ $fromAI('search_query', 'Use one simple accessible keyword, or at most two words, to search for the product the customer wants', 'string') }}",
  "per_page": "3",
  "page": "1",
  "stock_status": "instock",
  "_fields": "id,name,permalink,price,regular_price,sale_price,stock_status,in_stock,categories,sku,description"
}
